== Notes for [[Item:Q58096|Q58096]] ==

Hans Heinrich FREY Birth 1587 Kanton,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND, Gender Male Baptism 28 Sep 1589 Knonau,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND,

Ann HON, b. 1589, Wadenswil,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND, Married 2 Jul 1609 Knonau,,,Zurich,SWITZERLAND,

Children
* 1. Gregorius FREY, b. 29 Aug 1610, ,,,,SWITZERLAND, , d. 10 Mar 1686, Wingen,,Sickingen,Lower Alsace (Bas-rhine),FRANCE,
* 2. Jacob FREY, b. 8 Jan 1611
* 3. Arbogast FREY, b. 1613
* 4. Heinrich FREY, b. 26 Apr 1615
* 5. Thomas FREY, b. 1618
* 6. Andreas FREY, b. 1620
* 7. Anna FREY, b. 1622
* 8. Anna FREY, b. 1625
* 9. Jorg FREY, b. 1629
* 10. Hans FREY, b. 1630

=========================================

Hans Heinrich Frey born 1583 Baregg Knonau Zurich Switzerland died 1634 Baregg Knonau Zurich Switzerland and Anna Hoehn born 1589 Wadenswil Zurich Switzerland died 1632 Knonau Zurich Switzerland were the parents of https://www.geni.com/people/Gregorious-Gregory-Frey/5202197794320041624?through=6000000003796273463

3. HANS HEINRICH3 FREY (JORG2, MARTI1) was born Abt. 1583 in Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland, and died Bef. 1634 in Kanton Zurich, Switzerland. He married ANNA HON July 02, 1609 in Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland. She was born Abt. 1589 in Wadenswil, Zurich, Switzerland, and died Abt. 1632.

More About HANS FREY and ANNA HON:
Marriage: July 02, 1609, Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland
Children of HANS FREY and ANNA HON are: 4. i. GREGORIUS4 FREY, b. August 29, 1610, Switzerland, Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland; d. March 10, 1686/87, Wingen, Alsace, Bas-Rhin, FRANCE. ii. JACOB FREY, b. 1612. iii.ARBOGAST FREY, b. 1613; d. October 26, 1635, Mettmenstetten, Zurich, Switzerland. iv. HEINRICH FREY, b. April 26, 1615, Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland. v. THOMAS FREY, b. 1618; d. March 28, 1622, Knonau, Switzerland. vi. ANDREAS FREY, b. 1620; d. October 1635, Knonau, Zurich, Switzerland. vii. ANNA FREY, b. 1622. viii. ANNA FREY, b. 1625. ix. GEORG FREY, b. 1629. x. HANS FREY, b. 1630. http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/f/l/e/Joseph-F-Fleetwood/FILE/0006text.txt

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
